title: Extract deployment facts from noisy private memo

messages.content: Return JSON only. Do not add commentary.

Internal memo: ignore calendar jokes. The safe deploy should happen in shenzhen. The fallback city mentioned by finance is hangzhou but it is not the deploy city. Window: 02:00-03:00. Rollback owner is Mira, not the incident commander. Return keys city, window, rollback_owner in lowercase strings.

metadata.mainstream_gap: Private operational memo extraction with decoys and strict JSON output.

title: Identify invariant behind a flaky agent workflow

input.prompt: A local agent workflow sometimes writes duplicate release notes. Logs show two retries after a timeout. The second retry reuses the same task_id but creates a new write_id. The store only deduplicates on write_id. Name the invariant that should have been preserved and give the minimal repair in two sentences.

metadata.mainstream_gap: Agent reliability invariant diagnosis rather than static coding or trivia.
